component.name: Nova Mixer
component.summary: ChatMix for SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless on Linux

description.p: Nova Mixer brings ChatMix functionality to Linux for the SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless headset. It creates virtual PipeWire audio sinks (Game and Chat) that are controlled by the hardware dial on the base station, replacing the Windows-only SteelSeries Sonar software.

ul.li: Hardware ChatMix dial controls Game/Chat audio balance
Optional GUI with real-time volume bars and battery indicator
Auto-reconnect when device sleeps or is unplugged

description.p: Initial release with ChatMix support, GUI monitor, and battery indicator.
